admissions: Admissions open every year in June. Students can apply online through the Smart College admissions portal.
courses: Smart College offers B.Tech, MBA, BBA, MCA and Diploma programs in various disciplines.
departments: The college has departments including Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Civil Engineering.
academics: Smart College follows a semester based academic structure with modern labs and experienced faculty.
contact: You can contact Smart College at info@smartcollege.edu or call +91 98765 43210.
placement: Top companies visit Smart College every year including IT, manufacturing and consulting companies.
